mapper.select: SELECT v.* FROM ms_prompt_version v JOIN ms_prompt_template t ON v.template_id = t.id WHERE t.slug = #{slug} AND v.is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ms_prompt_version SET is_active = FALSE WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
UPDATE ms_prompt_version SET is_active = TRUE WHERE id = #{versionId}
